birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The thick-billed siskin (Spinus crassirostris) is a species of bird in the family Fringillidae, the finches and euphonias. It is found in Argentina, Bolivia, Chile, and Peru.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The ticking doradito (Pseudocolopteryx citreola) is a species of bird in subfamily Elaeniinae of family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Argentina, Bolivia, Chile, and possibly Paraguay.Remsen, J
